PETITION Petition For Court Order Determining Succession To Personal Property And For Treble Damages
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Continued To Oct-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Perez, via Zoom, for Palmer Vilagi; Stephen Goldberg, via Zoom, for Carol Bergman, Objector.

Mr. Perez reports that the matter settled via mediation on Aug-08-2022 and the agreement was signed yesterday. Mr. Perez advises that the terms of the agreement call for payment within 45 days and a filing of a Request for Dismissal within 5 days afterwards.

The matters are continued to Oct-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Dismissal is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION Petition For Court Order Determining Succession To Personal Property And For Treble Damages
Off Calendar Jun-01-2022 Continued To Aug-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Perez, via Zoom, for Palmer Vilagi, Petitioner; Robert Owen (specially appearing for Stephen Goldberg) for Carol Bergman, Respondent.

The court confirms that Mr. Goldberg waives formal service of the amended petition filed on 5/2-2022 and that he intends to file a new objection to the amended petition. Mr. Perez reports on the status of the matter. The court queries counsel whether the parties have had discussions. Messrs. Perez and Owen report that they are amenable to mediation. The court queries counsel regarding referring the matter to the Court's pro bono mediation at this time. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Jul-29-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Aug-04-2022. The Parties are to return on Aug-10-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The petition is continued to the same date. Mr. Owen advises that he waives service as to the Aug-10-2022 hearing date. Mr. Perez is instructed to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the minute order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation and serve it on all parties who are entitled to notice.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

PETITION Petition For Court Order Determining Succession To Personal Property And For Treble Damages
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Continued To Jun-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Court Order Determining Succession To Personal Property And For Treble Damages
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Continued To May-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Perez, via ZOOM, for Palmer Vilagi, Petitioner; Stephen Goldberg, via ZOOM, for Carol Bergman, Objector.

The court advises that the petition seems a bit confusing. Mr. Perez reports that he intends to file an amended petition by the next calling of this matter and that Mr. Goldberg has responded to informal written discovery and intends to suggest some form of ADR to Mr. Goldberg. Mr. Goldberg agrees with Mr. Perez' testimony and reports that he does not foresee much discovery on his behalf except for a request to provide a copy of a birth certificate. The court encourages the parties to agree to participate in some form of ADR, specifically the court's pro bono mediation program.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Court Order, etc., is continued to May-04-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.
